coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Relax. Breathe. Enjoy the ride. 7:30 of engine-building.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 0% through. Low intensity, high volume. Building the engine from ground up.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 75% FTP, 85-100 rpm. Relax and enjoy this. You're building massive aerobic capacity.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: The hardest part of easy rides is keeping them easy. 75%, 85-100 rpm. Stay disciplined.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 0% into ride. Smooth and steady. Build your aerobic base.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Starting threshold work. 100% for 12:00. This should hurt just enough.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: First threshold block. 95-100% FTP. Settle in — don't overcook the start.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: First block. This is race pace. This is where you spend most of a 40k TT. Own it.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: First block. Sweet spot: called 'sweet' by people who've clearly never done it.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Starting: 100% for 12:00. Settle in. You can hold this.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 6:00 at 60%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 1/3. 60% FTP, Seated. 6:00. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Stay focused and execute the plan. 60%, 85-95 rpm. You've trained for this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 60% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 1/1. 60% FTP, 85-95 rpm. Controlled effort. Execute the plan.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway: 41% done. Your mind is weak. Your body is stronger. 24 minutes left.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Midpoint: 25 minutes in. 100% at 82-90 rpm. Maximize time at threshold without crossing to VO2.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway: 41% done. You're not fading, you're adapting. 1 blocks left.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway: 41% complete. Congratulations! You've found where optimism goes to die.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 41% done. Check your form. Relax shoulders. Maintain 100%.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 60% through. Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 60% complete. Rep 1/1. 60% at 85-95 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 37 minutes of work done. 18 minutes to go. You can do this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 60% done. 0 intervals left. Only. ONLY. *nervous laughter*
coachingNotes.MIXED: 60% into session. 60%, 85-95 rpm. Focus and execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Last threshold block. 100% FTP. One more step toward crushing your old FTP. Worth it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Final threshold block: 12:00 at 100%. Then 6min easy. Hold power steady.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final block! Everything you've built leads to this. 12:00 at 100%. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Starting threshold work. Fun fact: FTP stands for 'Finally This Pain.' (It doesn't, but it should.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Final block. 100% × 12:00. Give it everything. 6min cooldown coming.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 55 minutes in. Your legs are lying. You have more.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1 of 1. Target: 60% FTP, 85-100 rpm. 0 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 90% through. This is your workout. Own it. 60% FTP.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 90% complete. Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very character-rich right now.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/1. 60% FTP × 6:00. Seated. Stay smooth. Breathe deep.
